{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's device
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] assembled a device for [[Little Blue]] from stolen [[Monarch]] ingredients.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The device in the cave was for [[madra]] purification to prepare [[Little Blue]] to advance to [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
